comment: Real Flipkart banner dimensions - updated to match actual Flipkart mobile homepage

hero_slider.notes: Full-width edge-to-edge, no rounded corners, no margin. Flipkart uses 2:1 not 5:2.

mid_page_carousel.notes: Full-width, no border-radius. Appears mid-page between product sections.

sponsored_editorial_banner.notes: Wider and shorter than hero. Used in sponsored sections. Full-width, flat.

ad_banner.notes: Standard ad format used by Flipkart for paid placements. Taller than editorial.

offer_card_image.notes: Square product thumbnail inside horizontal scroll cards.
